response.justification: James has extensive full-stack experience, strong cloud and AI-adjacent work (including MCP and agentic workflows), and leadership in open-source projects. However, his resume lacks direct evidence of GenAI-specific experience (e.g., RAG, vector databases, or multi-agent systems), which is critical for this role. His recent AI-agent infrastructure work at re:cinq is promising but not deeply detailed.
strengths: Strong full-stack engineering skills with TypeScript and cloud platforms (AWS CDK, React, MongoDB)
Proven leadership in open-source projects and technical mentorship (e.g., GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts)
Experience with AI-agent infrastructure (MCP, developer tooling) at re:cinq
concerns: No explicit mention of vector databases, RAG architectures, or multi-agent frameworks (e.g., LangGraph, CrewAI)
Limited direct experience with LLM performance metrics or optimization techniques
Resumé heavily focused on general software engineering rather than GenAI-specific roles
